comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Root cause confirmed in code/tests: Ralph creates each iteration as a fresh pi session, while tau sandbox UI overrides are stored only in the current session's tau:state entry. New child sessions therefore loaded no sandbox.sessionOverride and recomputed the default sandbox config. Added a regression that starts Ralph from a controller session with sandbox.sessionOverride=preset:full-access and asserts the child session setup receives a tau:state sandbox override without copying prompt-communication bookkeeping.
